name: Parse receipts with Google Drive and MySQL without manual work

parameters.content:
### Daily Schedule

Starts the workflow on a timer — daily at 6:00. No input data; downstream nodes fetch what they need.

Next: Download from Google Drive

### Download from Google Drive

googleDrive — `download` operation against the connected account.

Next: Parse XLSX Contents

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2

### Parse XLSX Contents

Parses the incoming XLSX binary into JSON items.

Next: Clean & Reshape Rows

### Clean & Reshape Rows

Custom JavaScript: Normalize incoming document records to a stable schema

Next: Load Rows into MySQL

### Load Rows into MySQL

mySql — `insert` operation against the connected account.

Next: Save Execution Metadata

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 MySQL connection

### Save Execution Metadata

Saves key fields onto the execution record — searchable later in n8n's execution list.

Next: Align Field Names

### Align Field Names

Normalizes field names so every source feeds the same downstream schema.

Next: Tag Pipeline Metadata

### Tag Pipeline Metadata

Shapes the item: writes `pipeline`, `version`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Cap Batch Volume

### Cap Batch Volume

Caps the stream at 50 items to protect downstream quotas.

# Parse receipts with Google Drive and MySQL without manual work

**Pattern:** File Processing · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Parse receipts with Google Drive and MySQL without manual work. It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual contracts is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Daily Schedule → Download from Google Drive → Parse XLSX Contents → Clean & Reshape Rows → Load Rows into MySQL → Save Execution Metadata → Align Field Names → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to file processing without manual effort
- Anyone automating contracts in legal
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Has retries and error handling built in
- Improves response time
- Responds in seconds

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2; MySQL connection.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your contracts process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
